entry.title: IDC W56HZV22D0083 (P00028) awarded to BAE SYSTEMS LAND & ARMAMENTS L.P., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE BRADLEY A4 FOLLOW-ON PRODUCTION EFFORT WILL DELIVER M2A4 AND M7A4 VEHICLES FROM VARIOUS INDUCTED LEGACY SOURCE VARIANTS BASED ON THE TDP DEVELOPED UNDER CONTRACT W56HZV-12-C-0358 BRADLEY A4 ECP AND THE TOP-LEVEL VEHICLE DRAWINGS.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: COMBAT, ASSAULT, AND TACTICAL VEHICLES, TRACKED

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MILITARY ARMORED VEHICLE, TANK, AND TANK COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV22D0083 (P00029) awarded to BAE SYSTEMS LAND & ARMAMENTS L.P., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION TO INCORPORATE A UCO. THIS MODIFICATION IS UPDATING THE PAINT SCOPE UNDER C.9.6 AND THEN REMOVING THE RM_PAINTING-RESET DRAWING UNDER C.9.18.5. CLIN 2099 IS CREATED FOR OP 2 PAINT UPDATE.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: COMBAT, ASSAULT, AND TACTICAL VEHICLES, TRACKED

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MILITARY ARMORED VEHICLE, TANK, AND TANK COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV22D0083 (P00030) awarded to BAE SYSTEMS LAND & ARMAMENTS L.P., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ADDING (4) GFP, ITEM: 25MM DRY CYLCE BOX, PT NUMBER:4294626. ADDING RFNI FOR GFP USE ON CONTRACT 23C0071.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: COMBAT, ASSAULT, AND TACTICAL VEHICLES, TRACKED

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MILITARY ARMORED VEHICLE, TANK, AND TANK COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION TO UPDATE AND ADD NEW CSL'S. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO PROVIDES FOR A NEW ECP AND REMOVES RFVS THAT ARE NO LONGER NEEDED DUE TO ADDING THE ECP.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: COMBAT, ASSAULT, AND TACTICAL VEHICLES, TRACKED

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION TO PROVIDE FOR A NEW SECTION H.17 FOR AUTHORIZATION FOR USE. USE FOR 36 BRADLE BOLTED BEAMS FOR USE ON AMPV. THE CONTRACTOR WILL BE PROVIDING 36 NEW BOLTED BEAMS WITH INSTALLATION AS PAYBACK.
